content.en:
For the invitation of the Lord of the Unbounded, Ye Tian naturally did not refuse.

After all, the Lord of the Boundless is the strongest person at the end of the realm, and he is far inferior to the other party now.

Moreover, the Lord of the Unbounded must know a lot of secrets, and his understanding of the Primordial Black Sea is also above him, so it is naturally necessary to have a good relationship with the Lord of the Unbounded.

"The Lord of the Unbounded invites me, then I'll bother!"

Ye Tian followed the Lord of the Boundary, first returned to the end of the realm, and then escaped from the end of the realm into the primordial black sea, so he quickly came to the dojo of the lord of the unbounded in the primordial black sea.

"The End of the Realm is a transit point for us, making it easy to travel through the Primordial Black Sea!" said the Unbounded Lord.

"Yes, if there is no boundary, it will indeed be very troublesome for us to hurry!" Ye Tian nodded.

The Unbounded Lord's dojo is huge, and the materials used here are extraordinary.

"Lord of the Boundless, your dojo is even more majestic than the power of the Extreme Dao Treasure!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

In his opinion, the value of this dojo surpassed that of a large number of extreme treasures.

Moreover, this dojo can actually be mobile, constantly moving in the Primordial Black Sea, even if Ye Tian came here today, he would not be able to find this dojo in the future.

"I have spent a lot of money to build this dojo, it is now a primordial divine weapon, even if it is tens of thousands of extreme treasures, it is not as valuable as it!"

The Unbounded Lord said.

"Primordial Divine Soldier, what kind of weapon division is this?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Unbounded did not hide it, and directly revealed: "Above the Extreme Treasure is the Primordial Divine Weapon, like the end of the world, there is no Primordial Divine Weapon, and there is no weapon to create the Primordial Divine Weapon, you must find similar materials in the Primordial Black Sea, so that there is hope to create the Primordial Divine Weapon! Of course, it is not easy to create the Primordial Divine Weapon, and it is very difficult." "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Afterwards, the Lord of the Boundless took out a tea leaf and made a pot of tea for Ye Tian.

"This is an ancient tea, you can taste it. "

The Unbounded Lord said.

"Thank you, Lord of the Unbounded!"

Ye Tian took a sip, and immediately felt that the will of the Extreme Dao had improved a little, and his comprehension had improved a little, and the speed of comprehending the Extreme Dao was much faster.

"Good tea!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

It was the first time he had seen the Extreme Dao will that could improve the strength of a person of his level, and it could also assist in attaining the Extreme Dao.

Moreover, the tea brewed from the original ancient tea is delicious.

"Primordial Ancient Tea is very rare, even I don't have much, and I only drink it occasionally!" said the Lord of the Boundless with a smile.

"Lord of the Unbounded, you invited me here, you didn't just drink tea, did you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally, it's not about drinking tea. The Boundless Lord's face turned straight and said, "Endless Lord, how much do you know about the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm?"

Ye Tian said: "If the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm raises his Extreme Dao to the Perfection Realm or any kind of Extreme Dao to perfection, and then breaks the limit of the Extreme Dao True Body and achieves the Extreme Dao Extreme Body, he can become the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and if the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller comprehends the Extreme Realm, it is another level, and his strength is greatly improved, and then he will continue to comprehend various Extreme Extremes and enhance his strength." As for how to improve later, I don't know. "

The Lord of the Boundless nodded slightly: "The situation that the Lord of Endless understands is a well-known situation in the Boundary End and the Extreme Path Deep Sea, but in fact, this division is very rough. Strictly speaking, those who have not comprehended the extreme path of the extreme realm can only be regarded as pseudo-extreme realm perfect controllers, and they are not really extreme realm perfect controllers at all. It's like the end of the realm, there are only a few people who can really be regarded as the perfect controller of the extreme realm, and there are more than a dozen of them in the extreme deep sea. Of course, if you break through the realm, you will be counted as one. "

"The Extreme Realm Perfect Controller who comprehends the Extreme Extreme Path is the real Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, which can also be called a Primordial Ancestor. The Primordial Ancestor is another name for the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm, and the End of the Realm and the Ten Directions Black Domain can all be called the Primordial Domain. "

Primordial Domain, Primordial Ancestor!

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard this kind of title, but the Lord of the Boundless was definitely not naming indiscriminately.

The Unbounded Lord continued: "Most of the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters can only be regarded as a one-fold Primordial Ancestor, even if they comprehend several Extreme Extremes, they can only be regarded as one-fold Primordial Ancestors, if they comprehend the Extreme Space-Time Extreme Path, and cultivate to the limit of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, this is a two-fold Ancestor; "

"What, the Extreme Extreme Dao can be engraved on the Pagoda of Will?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Of course you can, it's just that ordinary ancestors can't do it at all, and if they don't comprehend the Extreme Space-Time Pole, the Extreme Dao will can't break the limit, and they are not qualified to engrave the Extreme Extreme Dao on the Pagoda of Will. And to tell you a secret, the condensation method of the Pagoda of Will was not created by the end of the realm, but the inheritance I obtained from the end of the realm after an incomparably terrifying powerhouse fell to the end of the world, and this was passed on to the practitioners of the end of the world. And the Pagoda of Will is too important for the cultivators at the end of the realm, without the Pagoda of Will, many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers have no hope of breaking through to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller. It's like the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, they have so many True Realm Perfect Controllers, why are there so few beings who have broken through to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers? It's that their Dao is incomplete! Actually, they can't be blamed, the limitations of this Extreme Dao creatures, and the Will Pagoda is the inheritance of cultivators, and they have obtained it, but they can't cultivate. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

He really thought that the Pagoda of Will was the supreme method created by the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, and it turned out to be the inheritance obtained from the original black armor master!

"Lord of the Unbounded, what about the Triple Ancestor?"

Ye Tian continued to ask for advice.

The Unbounded Lord continued: "Above the Triple Primordial Ancestor is the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, if you want to reach the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, it is very difficult, not only does you need to achieve the thirty-sixth layer of the Will Pagoda, but at least you need to comprehend the nine Extreme Extremes, and create the Primordial Mastery Technique, the Primordial Mastery Technique also involves the power of the Nine Extreme Extremes at the very least, so if you can't comprehend more than nine Extreme Extremes, you won't be able to create the Primordial Mastery Technique!" I have never seen a fourfold primordial ancestor, even if it is a triple primordial ancestor, there is a big difference in strength between each other, for example, the triple primordial ancestor who has only comprehended one extreme extreme path and the triple primordial ancestor who has comprehended the nine extreme extremes is too different! As for the fivefold primordial ancestor and sixfold primordial ancestor above the fourfold primordial ancestor, I have only heard of the name, and I have not heard of any relevant information, so don't ask me!"

"I didn't expect there to be so many divisions at the level of the original ancestor!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Hahaha, I was also shocked when I first knew, but the Lord of the Golden Body and the Lord of the White Night at the End of the Realm have the hope of succeeding in the Double Ancestor, as for the Triple Ancestor, it will be difficult, it is not so easy to engrave the Extreme Extreme Dao on the Pagoda of Will, it is many times more difficult than comprehending an Extreme Extreme Dao!

"That's still early!" Ye Tian said modestly.

Immediately, he was very curious: "Lord of the Unbounded, what level are you at?"

"Me?" the Unbounded Lord smiled and said, "I'm lucky, I'm a Triple Ancestor!"

"Boundless Lord, those Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, they don't have the Will Pagoda, can they become the Triple Ancestor?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Unbounded Lord nodded: "Extreme Dao creatures also have the hope of becoming a Triple Primordial Ancestor, but it is many times more difficult than us cultivators, unless they can complete the bloodline transformation and transform into the Primordial Black Beast. The Abyss Palace Master of the Extreme Deep Sea is trying to become a primordial black beast, but unfortunately he has no inheritance, he is all studying blindly, and there is not much hope!"

"Wouldn't the Unbounded Lord be able to easily kill the Abyss Palace Master?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"It's true that you can kill him, but there's no need!" said the Lord of the Boundary: "With the existence of Extreme Dao creatures, at least it can put pressure on the cultivators at the end of the realm, otherwise, if there is no pressure, the infighting at the end of the realm will be serious, even if a demonic genius is born, maybe he will die in the assassination, so I keep the Extreme Dao creatures!"

"The Unbounded Lord is doing the right thing!"

Ye Tian agreed.

At this moment, he thought that if those extreme creatures knew the truth, he would be terrified.

They have always thought that they are above the end of the realm, and their strength is even stronger than the end of the realm, and as a result, the end of the realm can destroy the extreme creatures of the deep sea at any time.

The Lord of the Boundless said again: "Lord of Endless, the main reason why I have introduced so much to you is to be optimistic about you. In the end of the realm, you are the one who has a great hope of becoming a triple ancestor, and you can even become the strongest among the triple ancestors. As for the Quadruple Ancestor, it was too difficult, I didn't dare to imagine it. If you become a Triple Origin Ancestor in the future, I hope you can send a clone to sit at the end of the realm for a long time, after all, if the Origin Domain is accidentally unlucky, it will still be very dangerous to provoke the Primordial Black Beast, just like the end of the Ten Directions Black Domain. And I'm just a real body, or it won't be long before I leave, maybe I won't be able to come back for a long time in the future, if there is a triple ancestor in my hometown, it will be much safer!"

"If you don't say it, Lord of the Boundary, I will definitely send a clone to sit at the end of the realm!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

"Actually, there's one more request. The Unbounded Lord said, "I want you to go to a place and help me get a treasure, of course, until you get to the Triple Ancestor." I didn't dare to go, because I was a real body, and if it fell, it would really fall. But you have a clone, even if the clone falls, it will take a long time to slowly condense it, and the loss will not be too great. If you agree, I can give you a copy of the Extreme Path Inscription Method, if there is no Extreme Path Inscription Method, it is almost impossible for you to engrave the Extreme Extreme Path on the Pagoda of Will on your own, the success rate is too low, almost zero! Moreover, what I give is the Extreme Space Extreme Path inscription method, you have comprehended the Extreme Space Extreme Path, if you have this method, you can use it to engrave the Extreme Space Extreme Path on the Pagoda of Will in the future, so as to impact the Triple Ancestor Realm. "

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly agreed: "Lord of the Boundary, I agree!"

"Great!"

The Unbounded Lord was thrilled.

Immediately, the Lord of the Unbounded took out a black bead: "This is a space extreme inscription method - Void Inscription Technique, which can increase the success rate of one out of five, this method can only be passed on with this bead, and the number of inheritances is limited, you can only inherit it once, there are two more in it, I can't give it to you." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Then, Ye Tian began to inherit the Void Inscription Technique.

Rumble!!!!

Countless mystical information poured into Ye Tian's will, and was gradually absorbed and digested by Ye Tian.

After a long time, Ye Tian successfully inherited the Void Inscription Technique.

After the inheritance, Ye Tian knew how difficult it was to engrave the Extreme Path on the Pagoda of Will, and he couldn't just try it, once it failed, the Pagoda of Will would be seriously damaged, and it would take endless years to repair, or use countless precious materials to repair.

What's more, if you fail too many times, it will affect the foundation of the Pagoda of Will.

Therefore, the inscription method with a high success rate is naturally extremely precious.

The Void Inscription can increase the success rate of 1 out of 5, which is actually 1 out of 5, after all, the success rate itself is negligible.

The success rate of five out of five seems to be very low, but Ye Tian feels that this is definitely not low, if there is really a high level of inscription, then the Lord of the Boundless will not say that the Lord of the Golden Body of the End of the Realm and the Lord of the Boundless have no hope of becoming the Triple Ancestor.

In addition, if the number of inscription failures increases, the success rate decreases.

Therefore, it is best to get it right the first time.

"I didn't expect it to be so difficult to become a Triple Ancestor, and the price of failing to engrave it would be so great!" Ye Tian said with emotion: "Lord of the Boundary, is there a treasure that increases the success rate of the Extreme Path of Inscription?"

The Unbounded Lord nodded: "Naturally, there is, but it's too precious for me to get." The reason why I say that you have a great hope of becoming a Triple Origin Ancestor is because you condensed the Will Pagoda in advance when you were in the realm of the Super Perfect Controller, which will increase the success rate of one percent, and the reason why you comprehend the Extreme Space Extreme Dao in advance before the original ancestor can increase the success rate of one percent. In this way, with the addition of the Void Inscription Technique of 1 out of 5, that is the success rate of 3 out of 5! The success rate of 3 out of 5, even if the first inscription fails, the success rate within three times is very high. Basically, as long as you are not too lucky, you have more than ninety percent hope of becoming a triple ancestor in the future. "

"The realm of the super-perfect master condenses the will pagoda in advance, and the original ancestor has comprehended the extreme path before, which can increase the success rate of inscribed the extreme path!!"

Ye Tian finally knew why the Lord of the Boundless valued him so much, because he was a genius!

......
